title: Scott Laidlaw
compiled_truth: Scott Laidlaw is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-09-28), Scott Laidlaw sent 15 and received 47 emails, totalling 62 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (12), [Dan Shultz](people/dan-shultz) (10), [Matthew Tezyk](people/matthew-tezyk) (7), [Ben Jacoby](people/ben-jacoby) (7), [Chris Booth](people/chris-booth) (6).
